text:
Meet Max—a wise owl. Each evening, he would glide to the edge of his forest home to drink from the moonlit waterfall. One particular night, as he floated on his feathers, he observed something unusual at the foot of his hill—a circle of lights.

Curious, Max approached cautiously. As he got closer, he realized those lights were from a peculiar kind of fairy. They seemed cheerful, dancing around in a rhythm all their own.

Max watched them until they began to speak. "Hello! We've never seen an owl before. Welcome."

Confused but intrigued, Max posed some questions. They explained how they liked to listen to tales of other critters. He told them about his nights, his waterfalls, his owlish wisdom.

As the moon rose higher, the fairies began teaching Max about moonlit night songs. Each note seemed to glow a little brighter. They showed him how to sing along. Inspired, Max sang his best owl tune, harmonizing perfectly with
